name: Compass Agent
description: User-facing control-plane agent that uses the agentic runtime to route requests, summarize results for users, and dispatch work to Team Lead, Office Agent, and other specialized agents within the Constellation system.

skills.name: Constellation Orchestrator
skills.description: Uses the agentic runtime to route user requests, dispatches to Team Lead, Office Agent, Tracker, SCM, Android, and other agents, and summarizes final results for the user.

skills.name: Orchestrator Progress Reporting
skills.description: Receives major progress updates for orchestrated tasks.

skills.name: Orchestrator Task Callback
skills.description: Receives downstream task callbacks for completion, failure, and input-required state changes.

skills.name: Orchestrator User Interaction
skills.description: Bridges agent input-required requests back to the user-facing orchestrator flow.

skills.name: Orchestrator Task Status
skills.description: Returns orchestrated task status and user-visible progress summaries.
